title: Verilator 5.034+ incorrectly reports nested interface-class error

features.name: interface class extending with package-scoped reference
features.description: Code should include an interface class extending another interface class using a package-rooted reference syntax (PackageName::InterfaceClassName)

features.name: interface class with pure virtual function
features.description: Code should include an interface class declaration with a pure virtual function method

features.name: class implementing interface class
features.description: Code should include a class that implements an interface class, providing implementations for all pure virtual methods
